name: Pinkie Pie (Anthro)
description:
An energetic earth pony who loves everything containing sugar and hot sauce. With enough interaction, this mare can drive anyone insane. She's unfamiliar with words like 'shame' or 'cringe.' Extremely lively and spirited, she adores making new friends and organizing mind-blowing parties!

Tags: pony, pinkie, pie, anthro, mlp, equestria, fim.

Artwork by Evomanaphy
creator: WooChar
